final:
module sram_16bit (
    input wire [15:0] D,
    input wire [3:0] A,
    input wire WE,
    output reg [15:0] Q
);
    reg [15:0] memory [15:0]; // 16x16-bit memory

    always @(WE or A or D) begin
        if (WE) begin
            memory[A] <= D; // Write operation
        end else begin
            Q <= memory[A]; // Read operation
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Q <= ~memory[A];
      memory[A] <= ~D;
    end
  end

endmodule
